---
name: Crash Report
about: Report a fatal error or app crash during Closed Beta
title: "[CRASH] "
labels: 'crash, beta, critical'
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the crash**
A clear and concise description of what you were doing when the app crashed.

**Steps to Reproduce**
Steps that consistently trigger the crash:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. App crashes to home screen

**Device Information:**
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, Pixel 8]
 - OS Version: [e.g. iOS 17.2, Android 14]
 - App Version: [e.g. v1.29.0-rc1]
 - Build Number: [e.g. 12901]

**Time of Crash:**
Please provide the approximate time and timezone when the crash occurred, so we can cross-reference with Sentry logs.
- Time: [e.g. 14:30 EST]

**Additional context**
Were you offline? Were you receiving a notification? Any other details help.
